entry.title: New: CR 25-73 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending the following: 1. FIRST READING of Bill 131, CD1 (2025), to grant a Conditional Change in Zoning from R-1 Residential District to B-2 Community Business District for 14,467 square feet at 1448 Front Street, Lahaina, Hawai‘i, identified for Real Property Tax purposes as Tax Map Key (2) 4-5-013:012, for the development of parking structure or lot uses and related accessory uses; and 2. RECORDATION of the Unilateral Agreement.

Disaster Recovery, International Affairs, and Planning Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
